title: Exterior Door Handle Front Left Black For 99-16 Ford F-250 F-350 Super Duty
bullets: Heavy-duty black textured finish over rugged injection-molded plastic withstands job site conditions, UV exposure, and extreme temperatures
Direct replacement for factory door handle with clip-on attachment type and no modification required for installation
Oversized textured grip surface provides secure handling with work gloves and in all weather conditions
Precision-engineered to match factory dimensions and mounting points for 1999-2016 Ford F-250 and F-350 Super Duty trucks
Replace worn, broken, or seized handles in minutes with basic hand tools for a fast and reliable repair
Each handle is individually inspected for fit, finish, and latch mechanism operation before packaging
